docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-09-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CCSF - PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR REPRESENTED BY LUIS VILLALOBOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LISA ANN SIORDIA IS PRESENT.
